name: dokploy-manager
title: Dokploy Manager
description: Manage your Dokploy servers from Raycast. Connect multiple instances, deploy and restart services, read logs and build history, and keep an eye on everything from the menu bar.
author: merttopuz

commands.name: projects
commands.title: Browse Projects
commands.description: Browse Dokploy projects, environments and their services.

commands.name: services
commands.title: Search Services
commands.description: Search every application, compose stack and database across the active Dokploy account.

commands.name: deployments
commands.title: Recent Deployments
commands.description: Browse recent deployments across your Dokploy accounts and read their build logs.

commands.name: templates
commands.title: Deploy Template
commands.description: Browse Dokploy's ready-made compose templates and install one into a project.

commands.name: manage-accounts
commands.title: Manage Accounts
commands.description: Add, edit, remove and switch between multiple Dokploy accounts.

commands.name: menu-bar
commands.title: Service Status
commands.subtitle: Dokploy
commands.description: Keep an eye on your Dokploy services from the menu bar, and deploy or restart them in one click.

preferences.name: menuBarScope
preferences.title: Watch
preferences.description: Whether the menu bar watches every connected Dokploy instance or only the active one.

tools.name: list-accounts
tools.title: List Dokploy Accounts
tools.description: List the connected Dokploy instances and which one is active.

tools.name: list-projects
tools.title: List Projects
tools.description: List every Dokploy project with the services in it and their status.

tools.name: list-services
tools.title: List Services
tools.description: List services across the instance, optionally filtered by type, project or status. Use status 'error' to find what is broken.

tools.name: get-service
tools.title: Get Service
tools.description: Get details of one service: status, source repository or image, build type and domains.

tools.name: get-service-logs
tools.title: Get Service Logs
tools.description: Read the runtime logs a service's container is printing.

tools.name: list-deployments
tools.title: List Deployments
tools.description: List the build history of an application or compose stack, including which builds failed.

tools.name: get-deployment-logs
tools.title: Get Deployment Logs
tools.description: Read the build log of a deployment. Use this to find out why a deploy failed.

tools.name: deploy-service
tools.title: Deploy Service
tools.description: Trigger a new deployment of a service.

tools.name: control-service
tools.title: Start, Stop or Reload Service
tools.description: Start, stop or reload a running service.

preferences.name: logTail
preferences.title: Log Lines
preferences.description: How many log lines to fetch when viewing service logs.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
